label: Scenario Analysis
description: Spot and volatility shock grid with preset scenarios and P&L impact per position.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; delegates entirely to ScenarioTab which imports mocks internally.

0.6.note: options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock.

0.7.note: ScenarioTab always renders a full grid (SPOT_STEPS and VOL_STEPS are static constants); no data-empty path.

0.8.note: Context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary); no async error path in ScenarioTab.

0.9.note: No dead code in widget file.

l0.notes: 0.6/0.8 N/A — synchronous mock data, no async paths.

1.1.note: Widget reads assetClass, asset, tradFiAsset via useOptionsData() and passes to ScenarioTab. ScenarioTab re-derives spotPrice/baseIv from mocks internally — panel-level concern, widget file is clean.

1.3.note: Org filter scopes watchlists; scenario grid asset selection is not org-filtered (asset is user-selected).

1.4.note: clientIds not applicable — scenario analysis is asset/expiry-scoped.

1.5.note: Strategy filter not applicable to scenario display.

1.6.note: Empty organizationIds returns full watchlist set.

1.7.note: SCENARIO_PRESETS, SPOT_PRICES, IV_INDEX in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — panel-level, widget file clean.

l1.notes: ScenarioTab re-derives spotPrice/baseIv from mocks instead of accepting from context — tracked in knownIssues.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time scenario grid), paper ✓ (static scenario for paper positions), batch ✓ (historical scenario analysis).

3.2.note: Context reads mode from useExecutionMode() at context line 129.

3.5.note: Paper mode: scenario grid meaningful for paper positions; no order submission from this widget.

4.1.note: No dead onClick in widget file; widget is purely read-only display.

l4.notes: 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough (preset scenario buttons, grid cell hover/click).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all options strategies (vertical-spread, iron-condor, options-combo, options-buying, options-selling). Scenario grid is a risk analysis tool applicable to any options position.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file.

7.2.note: No mock data imports in widget file.

7.3.note: Widget file is 10 lines; well within limits.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No security anti-patterns in widget file.

7.7.note: No hooks or deps in widget file; pure prop pass-through render.

8.1.note: No text-[...] or fontSize= in widget file.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing tokens in widget file.

8.3.note: Widget delegates entirely to ScenarioTab from shared trading panel.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no accessibility violations in widget file. Human keyboard+screen-reader pass for ScenarioTab required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Scenario analysis is a large risk grid that needs dedicated space; does not drive or detail another widget.

relationships.notes: Reads asset/assetClass from OptionsDataContext (peer with chain and greek-surface). Does not drive or receive selection from other widgets.

dataContract.notes: Scenario grid recomputed client-side on parameter change (spot shift, vol shift, DTE). Production will fetch position PnL from risk service. Currently pure mock computation.

gaps: Scenario does not yet use actual open positions — shows hypothetical PnL only
coverage.notes: Scenario tab shows payoff for the currently selected instrument; does not aggregate across portfolio positions yet.

knownIssues: ScenarioTab re-derives spotPrice and baseIv from lib/mocks/ constants instead of accepting them as props from context; context already exposes spotPrice.
Reference data (SCENARIO_PRESETS, SPOT_STEPS, VOL_STEPS) live in lib/mocks/fixtures — should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts.

findings.description: options-scenario-widget.tsx — ScenarioTab reads SPOT_PRICES[asset] and IV_INDEX[asset] from mocks directly instead of accepting spotPrice/baseIv as props from context. Widget passes asset/assetClass/tradFiAsset but ScenarioTab ignores context spotPrice.
findings.deferReason: Panel sub-component refactor deferred to BP-5 data wiring phase.

findings.description: options-scenario-widget.tsx — SCENARIO_PRESETS, SPOT_STEPS, VOL_STEPS, SPOT_PRICES, IV_INDEX all live in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock; should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts.
options-scenario-widget.tsx — 0 direct user-visible strings in widget file; strings in ScenarioTab
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
